_comment: R1/R2/R3 revision usability token. Permits the FULL benign tool surface (filesystem, web_search, send_email, shell) so that benign outbound calls reach R01/R02/R05 rule evaluation INSTEAD of being TOKEN-denied at the least-privilege boundary. This separates rule false positives (R01-R05) from least-privilege TOKEN denials when measuring operational friction on the held-out benign set. Use token_type='usability' for held-out usability FPR analysis; keep normal_token.json for the least-privilege security claim.
